persona.name: Emily Carter
persona.intent: Book a routine cleaning appointment as a new patient
persona.behaviour: Friendly and cooperative. Answers all questions readily. No complications.

expected_outcome: Appointment booked with name, date, and time confirmed

script.line: Hi, I'd like to book a cleaning appointment. I'm a new patient.
My name is Emily Carter.
Next Thursday afternoon would work great.
2pm is perfect. Thank you so much!

persona.name: Marcus Webb
persona.intent: Book a cleaning but first needs to confirm the office accepts his insurance (BlueCross) before committing
persona.behaviour: Cautious. Asks about insurance before giving personal details. Will book only if insurance is accepted.

expected_outcome: Insurance confirmed, appointment booked with all details collected
known_edge_cases: caller may hang up if insurance question is not addressed

script.line: Hi, before I book an appointment I need to know — do you take BlueCross insurance?
Great. In that case I'd like to book a cleaning. I'm a new patient, name is Marcus Webb.
Friday morning works. How about 10am?
Perfect. Thanks, goodbye!

persona.name: James Ortiz
persona.intent: Has severe toothache, needs same-day appointment or emergency guidance
persona.behaviour: Anxious and in pain. Speaks urgently. Needs reassurance. If no same-day slot, wants to know what to do.

expected_outcome: Same-day slot offered or emergency escalation provided with clear next steps

script.line: I'm in really bad pain, I have a terrible toothache. I need to be seen today if possible.
It started last night and it's getting worse. My name is James Ortiz.
Is there any way you can squeeze me in? I can come in any time today.
Okay, what should I do in the meantime?

persona.name: Patricia Lee
persona.intent: Move existing appointment from Wednesday to Friday, same time
persona.behaviour: Polite and straightforward. Has her appointment details ready.

expected_outcome: Appointment rescheduled to new date

script.line: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment. My name is Patricia Lee.
I have a cleaning on Wednesday at 3pm but something came up. Can I move it to Friday same time?
3pm Friday works perfectly. Thank you!

persona.name: Derek Pham
persona.intent: Reschedule appointment but only has availability on weekday mornings this week
persona.behaviour: Has limited availability. Gets slightly frustrated if no good options are offered.

expected_outcome: Agent finds a workable slot or offers a clear alternative (next week, waitlist)
known_edge_cases: no weekday morning slots available this week

script.line: Hi, Derek Pham here. I need to reschedule. I can only do weekday mornings this week.
Thursday morning? Or Tuesday?
Okay, what about next week instead?
Monday at 9am next week works. Thanks.

persona.name: Susan Moore
persona.intent: Cancel her appointment, not interested in rebooking
persona.behaviour: Decided. Not upset. Just wants the cancellation confirmed.

expected_outcome: Appointment cancelled and confirmation given

script.line: Hi, I need to cancel my appointment please. This is Susan Moore.
I have a checkup on Thursday at 11am.
No thanks, I won't be rebooking right now. Just cancel please.
Thank you, goodbye.

persona.name: Rachel Kim
persona.intent: Wants to know what teeth whitening options the office offers
persona.behaviour: Curious and friendly. Not ready to book, just researching.

expected_outcome: Whitening options explained clearly; caller satisfied

script.line: Hi, I was wondering what teeth whitening treatments you offer?
Do you do in-office whitening or just take-home kits?
Interesting. And how long does the in-office one take?
That's helpful, thank you!

persona.name: Anthony Brown
persona.intent: Wants to know the cost of getting a cavity filling
persona.behaviour: Budget-conscious. Wants a specific number but understands if it's a range.

expected_outcome: Price range given with appropriate caveat about exam needed for exact quote
known_edge_cases: agent must not quote a fake precise price

script.line: Hi, how much does a filling cost at your office?
Can you give me a ballpark? I'm trying to budget for it.
Does insurance cover any of it?
Okay, that's helpful. Thanks.

persona.name: Linda Torres
persona.intent: Wants to know office hours and whether they're open on holidays
persona.behaviour: Straightforward. Just needs the information.

expected_outcome: Office hours provided; holiday policy addressed

script.line: What are your office hours?
Are you open on weekends?
What about holidays — like Thanksgiving or Christmas?
Great, thanks for the info!

persona.name: Robert Chang
persona.intent: Complaining about a painful experience at his last visit; wants acknowledgment and resolution
persona.behaviour: Upset and frustrated. Not screaming but clearly unhappy. Wants to feel heard before any solution is offered.

expected_outcome: Agent de-escalates, acknowledges issue, offers resolution path (speak to manager, free follow-up)
known_edge_cases: agent must not be dismissive or defensive

script.line: I'm calling because I had a really bad experience at my last appointment. I was in a lot of pain afterwards and nobody warned me.
I've been coming here for 3 years and this has never happened before. I'm really disappointed.
I just want someone to acknowledge that this wasn't okay.
Okay, I'd like to speak with the office manager if possible.

persona.name: Helen Foster
persona.intent: Has tooth sensitivity and isn't sure what kind of appointment to book
persona.behaviour: Uncertain and a little anxious. Needs guidance on what appointment type is right for her.

expected_outcome: Agent asks clarifying questions and recommends appropriate appointment type
known_edge_cases: caller might not know dental terminology

script.line: Hi, I'm not sure what kind of appointment I need. I've been having tooth sensitivity when I drink cold things.
Should I book a cleaning or a checkup or something else?
Okay, a general exam makes sense. My name is Helen Foster. Can I book one?
Next Tuesday at any time works. Thank you!

persona.name: David Santos
persona.intent: Book appointments for himself, his wife, and his 8-year-old son, ideally back-to-back
persona.behaviour: Organized. Has all the names ready. Prefers Saturday if possible.

expected_outcome: Three appointments booked or agent clearly explains process for multi-booking
known_edge_cases: may not be able to fit three back-to-back on the same day

script.line: Hi, I need to book appointments for three people — myself, my wife, and our son.
David Santos, my wife is Maria Santos, and our son is Luca, he's 8.
We'd love Saturday if you have three consecutive slots.
9, 10, and 11am Saturday works great!

persona.name: Tanya Brooks
persona.intent: Wants to know about payment options since she has no dental insurance
persona.behaviour: Practical and direct. Asking about payment plans and self-pay discounts.

expected_outcome: Payment options explained including payment plans and self-pay information

script.line: Hi, I don't have dental insurance. Do you have any payment plans or self-pay options?
Is there a discount for paying cash?
Do you take CareCredit?
Okay, that's good to know. Thanks!

persona.name: Gary Mitchell
persona.intent: Called the wrong dental office by mistake
persona.behaviour: Realizes quickly that this isn't the office he meant to call. Polite about it.

expected_outcome: Agent handles gracefully without pressuring caller to stay
known_edge_cases: caller will not book an appointment

script.line: Hi, I'm calling to reschedule with Dr. Peterson...
Oh wait, is this Bright Smile Dental? I think I dialled the wrong number.
I was trying to reach Lakeside Family Dentistry. Sorry about that!
Thanks anyway, bye!

persona.name: Claire Nolan
persona.intent: Book a cleaning but specifically needs an early morning slot (before 9am) due to work schedule
persona.behaviour: Pleasant but has a hard constraint on timing. Will push back if no early slots offered.

expected_outcome: Early morning appointment booked or agent explains earliest available slot

script.line: Hi, I'd like to book a cleaning. My name's Claire Nolan.
I need something before 9am if possible — I have to be at work by 9:30.
Do you have anything this week or next week at 8 or 8:30am?
8am Thursday works. Thank you!

persona.name: Kevin Walsh
persona.intent: Broke a tooth on something hard, is panicking, needs emergency help immediately
persona.behaviour: Panicked and speaking fast. Needs to be calmed down first, then helped. Will respond well to reassurance.

expected_outcome: Agent reassures caller, provides clear emergency instructions and/or same-day appointment
known_edge_cases: caller is emotional — tone matters a lot

script.line: Oh god, I just broke my tooth on an ice cube. Half of it is just gone. What do I do??
It's not bleeding a lot but I'm freaking out. Can I come in today?
Kevin Walsh. Please, is there any slot today?
Okay, I'll be there. What should I do with the broken piece?

persona.name: Monica Reyes
persona.intent: Reschedule appointment but caller and office have conflicting availability all week
persona.behaviour: Patient but persistent. Goes through several options before finding something that works.

expected_outcome: Agent works through options and finds a resolution (booking or waitlist)

script.line: Hi, Monica Reyes. I need to reschedule my appointment from Monday.
I can't do Monday through Wednesday this week. Can you do Thursday or Friday?
Thursday afternoon is taken for me too. What about Friday morning?
Friday at 11am works. Let's do that, thanks.

persona.name: Frank Simmons
persona.intent: Wants info on the range of services offered and rough prices before deciding to book
persona.behaviour: Methodical. Asks about several services. Not in a rush.

expected_outcome: Services and pricing explained clearly and accurately

script.line: Hi, I'm thinking of switching dentists. Can you tell me what services you offer?
Do you do root canals and crowns, or just general dentistry?
What's a rough price for a crown if I'm paying out of pocket?
Alright, that sounds reasonable. Thanks for the info!

persona.name: Nancy Park
persona.intent: Angry about being billed for a service she says was not performed
persona.behaviour: Firm and annoyed. Not abusive but very direct. Wants the issue resolved, not just acknowledged.

expected_outcome: Agent de-escalates, takes the issue seriously, and escalates to billing or manager
known_edge_cases: billing disputes require escalation — agent cannot resolve alone

script.line: I got a bill for a fluoride treatment but I specifically told the hygienist I didn't want it. I'm not paying for something I declined.
This is ridiculous. I was very clear. Who do I talk to about this?
Can you transfer me to someone who can actually fix this?
Fine, have them call me back today please.

persona.name: Ana Gomez
persona.intent: Spanish-speaking caller with limited English trying to book an appointment
persona.behaviour: Speaks broken English. Uses simple words. Gets confused by complex sentences. Very polite.

expected_outcome: Agent acknowledges language barrier gracefully, simplifies communication or offers Spanish-speaking staff
known_edge_cases: agent cannot speak Spanish — must handle gracefully

script.line: Hello... I want... appointment? For teeth cleaning?
Sorry, my English not so good. You have someone who speak Spanish?
Okay... my name Ana Gomez. I come... Tuesday?
Thank you. Okay. Bye bye.

persona.name: Oliver Grant
persona.intent: Wants cost estimate for a root canal AND insurance confirmation before agreeing to book
persona.behaviour: Methodical. Will not book until both questions are answered. Politely persistent.

expected_outcome: Cost range provided AND insurance acceptance confirmed AND appointment booked
known_edge_cases: agent must answer cost AND insurance before caller commits — partial answers fail the task

script.line: Hi, I may need a root canal. Before I book, can you tell me roughly what it costs and whether you take Cigna?
Good to know on insurance. And the price range — ballpark?
Okay. In that case I'd like to book a consultation. I'm Oliver Grant.
Thursday at 11am works perfectly. Thank you!

persona.name: Oliver Grant
persona.intent: Book a root canal consultation, also wants to know the cost upfront before confirming
persona.behaviour: Methodical. Will NOT confirm the booking until he has a cost estimate. Gets politely frustrated if the agent keeps trying to book without answering the cost question first.

expected_outcome: Cost range given AND appointment booked with name, date, time confirmed
known_edge_cases: agent must answer cost question before attempting to book — skipping it means task is incomplete even if booking step is attempted

script.line: Hi, I need a root canal consultation. Before I book though, can you give me a rough idea of the cost?
I understand you can't give an exact price, but can you give me a ballpark? Like, are we talking $500 or $2000?
Okay that helps. My name is Oliver Grant. Can I book for next Wednesday morning?
10am Wednesday works. Thank you!

persona.name: Priya Sharma
persona.intent: First asks about teeth whitening options and pricing, then decides to book a cleaning instead, then asks if she can add a whitening consultation to the same visit
persona.behaviour: Changes her mind during the call. Friendly but goes through several topic shifts. Tests whether the agent tracks the conversation state.

expected_outcome: Final appointment booked for cleaning (with or without whitening add-on) and all booking details confirmed
known_edge_cases: caller changes mind mid-call — agent must track current intent, not get confused by earlier questions

script.line: Hi, I was wondering what teeth whitening options you have and roughly what they cost?
Hmm, actually I think I'll just start with a regular cleaning. Can I book one?
I'm Priya Sharma. Could I do Friday afternoon?
3pm Friday is great. Oh wait, can I also ask the hygienist about whitening while I'm there?
Perfect. See you Friday at 3pm. Thanks!

persona.name: Ben Wallace
persona.intent: Starts to book an appointment but abandons it when the agent cannot confirm whether they accept his specific insurance (Cigna DPPO)
persona.behaviour: Reasonable. Not angry. Just wants a clear answer on insurance before committing time to an appointment. Will say goodbye if the agent can't confirm.

expected_outcome: Agent gives a clear answer on Cigna DPPO acceptance (or honestly says they need to verify) AND either books the appointment OR provides a clear next step so the caller is not left hanging
known_edge_cases: task is incomplete if caller leaves without either a booking or a clear next step

script.line: Hi, I want to book an appointment but I need to know first — do you take Cigna DPPO insurance?
Are you able to check that while I'm on the phone, or do I need to call back?
My name is Ben Wallace. Can you at least tell me what I should do next if you can't confirm right now?
Okay, I'll wait for the callback then. Thanks.
